{{Quote|We enjoy good relations with Raddus and his factions, but the Alliance has yet to convince the bulk of the Mon Cal.|Description of the Mon Cals in a report to Mon Mothma|<ref name="Rebel Files" />}}
The '''Mon Cal''' was a [[Mon Calamari]] resistance group led by [[Faa-Char]] during the [[Galactic Civil War]] that operated in Mon Calamari [[Realspace|space]] near [[Overic Griplink]]. Although the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]] had a good relationship with [[Admiral]] [[Raddus]] and his factions, the Rebel Alliance had not yet convinced the majority of the Mon Cals. Due to the actions of Raddus and his Mon Cal [[refugee]]s, the [[Galactic Empire]] viewed the entire Mon Calamari [[species]] as guilty of [[treason]].<ref name="Rebel Files" />

The Mon Cal were featured in a report to [[Mon Mothma]] on groups that the Rebel Alliance could ally themselves with, and the report was later included in ''[[The Rebel Files]]''. After the fall of the Empire and the rise of the [[First Order]], ''The Rebel Files'' were uncovered and given to the [[Resistance]]. When reviewing the files, [[Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar]] made a note on Faa-Char.<ref name="Rebel Files" />
